columns.name: event_timestamp
columns.desc: Timestamp since Epoch when event started on client device (trace start, network start, etc).

columns.name: app_display_version
columns.desc:
The display version of the application.
VersionName for Android; CFBundleShortVersionString for iOS.
E.g. "4.1.7".

columns.name: app_build_version
columns.desc:
The build version of the application.
VersionCode for Android; CFBundleVersion for iOS.
E.g. "1523456".

columns.name: os_version
columns.desc: Android API level or iOS version. E.g. "26" (Android) or "11.4" (iOS).

columns.name: device_name
columns.desc: Name of the client device. E.g. "Google Pixel".

columns.name: country
columns.desc:
2-letter country code of the country from which the event took place.
E.g. "US" or "ZZ" (unknown).

columns.name: radio_type
columns.desc: Active radio type when the event took place. E.g. "WIFI".

columns.name: custom_attributes
columns.desc: All custom attributes attached to this event.

columns.name: event_type
event_name
columns.desc:
Name of the event.
For DURATION_TRACE, the trace name.
For SCREEN_TRACE: "_st_" followed by the trace name.
For NETWORK_REQUEST: the network request url pattern.
For TRACE_METRIC: the metric name.

columns.name: parent_trace_name
columns.desc:
Name of the parent trace that carries the trace metric.
Only present for TRACE_METRIC.

columns.name: trace_info
columns.desc: Only present for DURATION_TRACE, SCREEN_TRACE, TRACE_METRIC.

fields.name: duration_us
fields.desc:
For DURATION_TRACE, SCREEN_TRACE: duration that this trace lasts.
For TRACE_METRIC: duration that the parent trace lasts.
Unit: microsecond.

fields.name: slow_frame_ratio
fields.desc:
The ratio of slow frames for this screen trace, between 0 and 1.
E.g. a value of 0.05 means 5% of the frames for this screen instance
took more than 16ms to load.

fields.name: frozen_frame_ratio
fields.desc:
The ratio of frozen frames for this screen trace, between 0 and 1.
E.g. a value of 0.05 means 5% of the frames for this screen instance
took more than 700ms to load.

fields.name: response_code
fields.desc: HTTP response code for the network response. E.g. 200 or 404.

fields.name: response_mime_type
fields.desc: MIME type of the network response. E.g. "text/html".

fields.name: request_http_method
fields.desc: HTTP method of the network request. E.g. "GET" or "POST".

fields.name: request_payload_bytes
fields.desc: Size of the network request payload. Unit: byte.

fields.name: response_payload_bytes
fields.desc: Size of the network response payload. Unit: byte.

fields.name: request_completed_time_us
fields.desc:
Microseconds after event_timestamp when network request sending is complete.
Unit: microsecond.

fields.name: response_initiated_time_us
fields.desc:
Microseconds after event_timestamp when network response is initiated.
Unit: microsecond.

fields.name: response_completed_time_us
fields.desc:
Microseconds after event_timestamp when network response is completed.
Unit: microsecond.
